analyst_notes: All assertions pass for both configurations - assertions are non-discriminating for this skill type
with_skill uses ~24% more tokens on average (79K vs 64K) due to reading skill + reference files
Duration is comparable (~7% slower with skill, within noise)

Key qualitative differences observed: with_skill consistently uses recommended libraries (typer over click, figlet, ora), follows 4-layer architecture, includes PPTX VIBE status line pattern, adds NO_COLOR support and non-interactive --yes flags
without_skill produces good code but with more variation: one used zero-dependency custom ANSI colors, one chose click over typer, none added PPTX VIBE status line pattern
Eval 2 (task-manager) shows clearest architectural difference: with_skill chose TypeScript with immutable patterns per project rules; without_skill chose vanilla JS with no TypeScript
